reviews.comment:
Llene el tanque de "Infinia" a los pocos kilómetros se me prendió la luz de engine. La moto no tiene no tuvo nunca un problema veremos si es la nafta de ahí. Hasta ahora todo indica que si

(Translated by Google)
I filled the tank with "Infinia" and after a few kilometers the engine light came on. The motorcycle has never had any problems; we'll see if it's the fuel. So far, everything indicates that it is.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4NG83cjhBRRAB
